news.summary: Prime Minister Pedro Sanchez maintains the cases against his family and entourage are politically motivated.

news.headline: Nascar champion Kyle Busch died of pneumonia and sepsis, family says
news.summary: The driver died aged 41 on Thursday after "overwhelming complications" from the illnesses.
